queries.question: Give me the descriptions of the attractions common to all theme parks
queries.sql: SELECT Attractions.description  from Theme_Parks_Attractions join Attractions on Theme_Parks_Attractions.attraction_id = Attractions.attraction_id join Theme_Parks on Theme_Parks_Attractions.theme_park_id = Theme_Parks.park_id   GROUP BY Theme_Parks_Attractions.attraction_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Theme_Parks_Attractions.theme_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Theme_Parks)

queries.question: For each theme park, display the corresponding types and descriptions of attractions.
queries.sql: select theme_parks.name , attractions.type , attractions.description from Theme_Parks_Attractions join Attractions on Theme_Parks_Attractions.attraction_id = Attractions.attraction_id join Theme_Parks on Theme_Parks_Attractions.theme_park_id = Theme_Parks.park_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type ?description WHERE {
  ?theme_parks_attractions a :Theme_Parks_Attractions .
  ?attractions a :Attractions .
  ?theme_parks_attractions p:hasAttractions ?attractions .
  ?theme_parks a :Theme_Parks .
  ?theme_parks_attractions p:hasTheme_Parks ?theme_parks .
  ?theme_parks p:name ?name .
  ?attractions p:type ?type .
  ?attractions p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: what are the descriptions of the attractions that each theme park has?
queries.sql: select theme_parks.name , attractions.description from Theme_Parks_Attractions join Attractions on Theme_Parks_Attractions.attraction_id = Attractions.attraction_id join Theme_Parks on Theme_Parks_Attractions.theme_park_id = Theme_Parks.park_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?theme_parks_attractions a :Theme_Parks_Attractions .
  ?attractions a :Attractions .
  ?theme_parks_attractions p:hasAttractions ?attractions .

queries.question: What types and descriptions of attractions are available at each theme park?
queries.sql: SELECT Attractions.type, Attractions.description  from Theme_Parks_Attractions join Attractions on Theme_Parks_Attractions.attraction_id = Attractions.attraction_id join Theme_Parks on Theme_Parks_Attractions.theme_park_id = Theme_Parks.park_id   GROUP BY Theme_Parks_Attractions.attraction_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Theme_Parks_Attractions.theme_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Theme_Parks)

queries.question: What are the types of the attractions that all theme parks have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Attractions.type  from Theme_Parks_Attractions join Attractions on Theme_Parks_Attractions.attraction_id = Attractions.attraction_id join Theme_Parks on Theme_Parks_Attractions.theme_park_id = Theme_Parks.park_id   GROUP BY Theme_Parks_Attractions.attraction_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Theme_Parks_Attractions.theme_park_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Theme_Parks)

  ?theme_parks_attractions p:hasAttractions ?attractions .
